info.name: Meal API - Spring Boot Backend
info.description: Professional Postman collection for the Spring Boot Meal API. Run folders in order. The collection saves JWT tokens and IDs into collection variables for later requests.

exec: pm.test("JWT is returned on register", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().token).to.be.a("string"); });

item.name: Login Before Email Verification - Error Case

exec: pm.test("Clear email verification message", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().error).to.eql("Please verify your email before logging in."); });

response.name: 400 Email Not Verified

exec: pm.test("Verification token returned", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include("Email verification token:"); });

item.name: Login Admin and Save Admin JWT

exec: pm.test("Password reset token returned", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include("Password reset token:"); });
pm.test("Password reset succeeded", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include("Password reset successfully"); });

item.name: Login With New Password and Refresh JWT

exec: pm.test("Profile was updated", function () { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.fullName).to.eql("Updated Postman User"); pm.expect(json.email).to.eql(pm.collectionVariables.get("updatedUserEmail")); });

formdata.description: Choose an image file in Postman before sending.

item.name: Protected Route Without JWT - Error Case

request.description: Set userIdToDeactivate manually before running this request.

item.name: Admin Route With User JWT - Error Case

exec: pm.test("Admin delete message", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text()).to.include("Recipe deleted by admin successfully"); });
